programmes.show_description: The latest issue of Crafting with Hunkydory magazine: issue 88, is packed full of detailed step-by-step cards & projects, free gifts, inspirational crafting content and more.
Artist Matthew palmer will be painting watercolour live this hour. Join him for some amazing book deals and exclusive watercolour products.
Join Leonie for the Art of Travelling Junk Journal launch. Packed with vintage-inspired designs and ideas, perfect for journal makers, papercrafters, and mixed-media enthusiasts.
Dive into the vibrant and mesmerising world of Encaustic Art, where wax and colour unite to create captivating masterpieces.
Artist Matthew palmer will be painting watercolour live this hour. Join him for some amazing book deals and exclusive watercolour products.

HobbyMaker Repeats.
Raymond Storry is back on Sewing Street with an hour of discounted dressmaking fabrics!
Debbie Shore is back with some brand new Easter templates and surprise baby Easter Chumleys.
Raymond Storry is back on Sewing Street with an hour of discounted dressmaking fabrics!
Debbie Shore is showcasing her 'My First Kits' - a perfect project for beginners, or if you're looking for a project to help teach children sewing.
Emma Simpson joins us for the final hour today with some beautiful Wool Couture projects!
Phill Martin is known for his creative designs. His versatile Sentimentally Yours collections are a must for crafters. Tune in to see his exclusive designs for our 4th Birthday!
The latest collection from Tim Holtz has arrived! Pete demonstrations techniques you can try on your handmade cards, gifts, scrapbook pages and journal layouts.
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!

We're getting in the mood for Spring with the Moda Garden Series Collection.
Mandy Shaw will be bringing us brand new Spring kits, perfect for this time of year!
...Fabric Bundles: Beautifully coordinated fabrics from top designers, ready to sew into stunning projects. Limited stock, so grab yours before they're gone!
Mandy Shaw will be bringing us some brilliant new quilt kits, along with beautiful new wall-hanging kits and bringing back sell out bags.
Discover reliable machines designed for everything from everyday repairs to dressmaking, quilting, and creative sewing projects.
Join AALL & Create and tune in for fabulous demos and amazing 4th birthday deals - a crafty hour awaits with new stamps, dies, stencils, washi tape and more.
Introducing Strawberry Tea: a special collection with Helz Cuppleditch, celebrating British spring & summer teas with cakes, scones, champagne, and iconic, beloved animal friends.
Meet the latest Golden Oldies collection: Senior Moments! Filled with charmingly funny artwork featuring grumpy grandads and groovy grannies, it's guaranteed to bring a smile.

Say goodbye to large frayed colour charts and endless swatching. These PRISM Swatch Cards are the answer to your crafting prayers, the perfect resource to add to your stash!
Named after Nigel at Craft Consortium's 7-year-old daughter, Olivia, this limited-edition collection is designed exclusively in partnership with the talented Karina Art Space.
